    <h1 {...{
      "id": "experience-tracking"
    }}>{`Experience tracking`}</h1>
    <p>{`Experience tracking measures how users interact with complete experiences (combinations of images, text, and CTAs) in your app.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "quick-start"
    }}>{`Quick start`}</h2>
    <p>{`You first register the experience. Then you can track the view of the experience, when the experience becomes visible. Or you can track the interaction on the experience, when the experience gets clicked (tapped).`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=quick-start" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=quick-start" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "registration-required"
    }}>{`Registration required`}</h2>
    <p>{`You must register an experience definition before tracking views or clicks. If you don't:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Asset attribution won't work.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Featurization hits won't be sent.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`A warning will be logged.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "basic-usage"
    }}>{`Basic usage`}</h3>
    <p>{`Basis usage of experience tracking is that you first register the experience, and then track the experience view or click.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "register-the-experience"
    }}>{`Register the experience`}</h3>
    <p>{`Register the experience once with all of its content.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=basic-usage" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=basic-usage" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "track-interactions"
    }}>{`Track interactions`}</h3>
    <p>{`Then track the experience.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=track-experience" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=track-experience" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "session-lifecycle"
    }}>{`Session lifecycle`}</h2>
    <p>{`Experience definitions are cached in memory for the duration of the app session. After app restart or crash, you'll need to re-register experiences before tracking.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=session-lifecycle" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=session-lifecycle" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`Re-registration is idempotent. Calling `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`registerExperience()`}</inlineCode>{` with the same content returns the same ID with no negative side effects. The featurization service is also idempotent, so even if the same experience definition is sent multiple times (for example, after cache eviction or app restart), there's no duplication or data inconsistency on the backend.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "cache-behavior"
    }}>{`Cache Behavior`}</h3>
    <p>{`The SDK uses an LRU (Least Recently Used) cache with a capacity of 100 experience definitions:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Capacity: 100 definitions maximum.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Eviction: When full, least recently used definitions are removed.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Memory-only: Not persisted to disk.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`The benefits are:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Fast lookups for asset attribution.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Bounded memory usage (~20-40KB worst case).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Automatic cleanup of stale definitions.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`No disk I/O overhead.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Safe re-registration: Featurization service handles duplicates gracefully.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`For most apps, 100 definitions is sufficient. If you're registering more unique experiences per session, consider reusing experience IDs where content is identical (same content = same ID).`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "implementation-patterns"
    }}>{`Implementation patterns`}</h2>
    <p>{`See below for examples of implementation patterns.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "single-screen"
    }}>{`Single screen`}</h3>
    <p>{`Implementation of experience tracking for a single screen.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=implementation-single-screen" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=implementation-single-screen" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "collection-or-feed"
    }}>{`Collection or feed`}</h3>
    <p>{`Implementation of experience tracking for a collection or a feed.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=implementation-collection-feed" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=implementation-collection-feed" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "experience-id-generation"
    }}>{`Experience ID generation`}</h3>
    <p>{`Experience IDs are deterministic - the same content always produces the same ID. The algorithm:`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Sort text values alphabetically.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Sort asset URLs alphabetically.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Sort CTA values alphabetically.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Join all with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`|`}</inlineCode>{` separator (texts, then assets, then CTAs).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`SHA-1 hash the combined string.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Take first 12 hex characters.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Prefix with `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`mobile-`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "example"
    }}>{`Example`}</h4>
    <p>{`Imagine the following details:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`// Content: texts=["$99", "Product"], assets=["img.jpg"], ctas=["Buy"]
// Sorted & joined: "Product|$99|img.jpg|Buy"
// SHA-1 → first 12 chars → "mobile-a1b2c3d4e5f6"
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`This means you can:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Pre-compute IDs server-side for consistent cross-platform IDs.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Cache by content hash instead of arbitrary keys.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Detect content changes by comparing IDs.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=experience-id-generation" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=experience-id-generation" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "missing-registration-warning"
    }}>{`Missing registration warning`}</h2>
    <p>{`If you track without registering, you will see this warning.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="error" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Experience definition not found for 'exp-123'. Call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`registerExperience()`}</inlineCode>{` before tracking views/clicks.`}</p>
    <p>{`This means:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`View/click events still go to Analytics.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`But asset attribution won't work.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Featurization service won't get the data.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Fix the warning by registering the experience first.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=missing-registration-warning" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=missing-registration-warning" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "asset-attribution"
    }}>{`Asset attribution`}</h2>
    <p>{`When you register an experience with assets, the SDK links those asset URLs to the experience. This enables asset attribution: connecting standalone asset tracking events to their parent experience.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Asset attribution works regardless of the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`batchingEnabled`}</inlineCode>{` setting. The SDK caches experience definitions locally, so attribution is based on the registration cache - not on how events are batched for network delivery.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "how-it-works"
    }}>{`How it works`}</h3>
    <p>{`See below how asset attribution works.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=asset-attribution" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=asset-attribution" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`When the analytics backend receives `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`trackAssetView`}</inlineCode>{` for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`hero.jpg`}</inlineCode>{`, the backend attributes that view to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Summer Sale`}</inlineCode>{` experience because the asset URL was registered.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "without-attribution"
    }}>{`Without attribution`}</h3>
    <p>{`You can track an asset without registering the experience first.`}</p>
    <TabsBlock orientation="horizontal" slots="heading, content" repeat="2" mdxType="TabsBlock" />
    <p>{`Android`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=android&task=implementation-collection-feed" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`iOS`}</p>
    <Tabs query="platform=ios&task=implementation-collection-feed" mdxType="Tabs" />
    <p>{`The asset view is still recorded, but the asset view is not linked to any experience. As a result, you lose:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Which experience contained this asset.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Performance metrics per experience.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`A/B test attribution.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{

    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`experienceLocation`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`assetLocation`}</inlineCode>{` parameters control how metrics are grouped in Customer Journey Analytics.`}</p>

    <h3 {...{

      <li parentName="ol">{`Customer Journey Analytics queries: reports can segment by any machine learning attribute and location.`}</li>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "debugging-with-assurance"

    <p>{`Adobe Assurance (Project Griffon) lets you inspect tracking events in real-time. Connect your app to an Assurance session to see exactly what payloads are being sent.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "setup"
    }}>{`Setup`}</h3>
    <p>{`To setup Assurance, import the extension and start the session.`}</p>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "what-youll-see-in-assurance"
    }}>{`What You'll See in Assurance`}</h3>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Track Asset Events`}</p>
        <p parentName="li">{`When you call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`trackAssetView()`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`trackAssetClick()`}</inlineCode>{`, you'll see:`}</p>
        <pre parentName="li"><code parentName="pre" {...{
            "className": "language-json"
          }}>{`Event: Track Asset
Type: com.adobe.eventType.contentAnalytics
Source: com.adobe.eventSource.requestContent

Payload:
{
"assetURL": "https://example.com/hero.jpg",
"interactionType": "view",
"assetLocation": "homepage.hero",
"assetExtras": {
    "assetLoadTime": 120,
    "assetSize": 45000
}
}
`}</code></pre>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Track Experience Events`}</p>
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul">
            <p parentName="li">{`When you call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`registerExperience()`}</inlineCode>{`:`}</p>
            <pre parentName="li"><code parentName="pre" {...{
                "className": "language-json"
              }}>{`Event: Track Experience
Type: com.adobe.eventType.contentAnalytics

Payload:
{
"experienceId": "mobile-abc123...",
"interactionType": "definition",
"assetURLs": ["https://example.com/hero.jpg"],
"texts": [
    {"value": "Summer Sale", "styles": {"role": "headline"}}
],
"ctas": [
    {"value": "Shop Now", "styles": {"enabled": true}}
]
}
`}</code></pre>
          </li>
          <li parentName="ul">
            <p parentName="li">{`When you call `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`trackExperienceView()`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`trackExperienceClick()`}</inlineCode>{`:`}</p>
            <pre parentName="li"><code parentName="pre" {...{
                "className": "language-json"
              }}>{`Event: Track Experience
Type: com.adobe.eventType.contentAnalytics

Payload:
{
"experienceId": "mobile-abc123...",
"interactionType": "view",
"experienceLocation": "homepage.hero",
"experienceExtras": {
    "experienceViewDuration": 3500
}
}
`}</code></pre>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </li>

        <p parentName="li">{`Edge Network Events`}</p>
        <p parentName="li">{`After batching, you'll see the Edge request:`}</p>
        <pre parentName="li"><code parentName="pre" {...{
            "className": "language-json"
          }}>{`Event: Edge Request
Type: com.adobe.eventType.edge

Payload:
{
"xdm": {

    "asset": {
        "url": "https://example.com/hero.jpg",
        "location": "homepage.hero"
    }
    }
}
}
`}</code></pre>
      </li>
    </ol>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "common-issues-in-assurance"
    }}>{`Common Issues in Assurance`}</h3>
    <p>{`No events appearing:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Check extension is registered.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Verify MobileCore.dispatch() is being called.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Events but no Edge request:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Check consent status (must be "yes" or "pending").`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Wait for batch timeout (default 5s) or threshold (default 10 events).`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Missing experienceId in track events:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Ensure registerExperience() was called first`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Check the returned ID is being passed to track methods`}</li>
    </ul>
